message:
Use DELETE journal mode instead of WAL for NFS compatibility

WAL mode requires shared memory (mmap) which doesn't work on NFS.
EFS is NFS under the hood, so the DB would fail at runtime. DELETE
mode uses file-based locking which works reliably on NFS, and is
fine for our single-process use case.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
